'''zharodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobbie|dobbie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobbie|dobbie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zharodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæredeth|zhæredeth]] || [[word:zhæredej|zhæredej]] || [[word:zhæredesh|zhæredesh]] || [[word:zhærede|zhærede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zharorodoth|zharorodoth]] || [[word:zharorodoj|zharorodoj]] || [[word:zharorodosh|zharorodosh]] || [[word:zharorodo|zharorodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zharodoth|zharodoth]] || [[word:zharodoj|zharodoj]] || [[word:zharodosh|zharodosh]] || [[word:zharodo|zharodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zharofdoth|zharofdoth]] || [[word:zharofdoj|zharofdoj]] || [[word:zharofdosh|zharofdosh]] || [[word:zharofdof|zharofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zharodotho|zharodotho]] || [[word:zharodojo|zharodojo]] || [[word:zharodosho|zharodosho]] || [[word:zharodoko|zharodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zharodoth|zharodoth]] || [[word:zharodoj|zharodoj]] || [[word:zharodosh|zharodosh]] || [[word:zharodo|zharodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zharodothol|zharodothol]] || [[word:zharodojol|zharodojol]] || [[word:zharodoshol|zharodoshol]] || [[word:zharodokol|zharodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zharodothotho|zharodothotho]] || [[word:zharodojojo|zharodojojo]] || [[word:zharodoshosho|zharodoshosho]] || [[word:zharodoko|zharodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zharodothon|zharodothon]] || [[word:zharodojon|zharodojon]] || [[word:zharodoshon|zharodoshon]] || [[word:zharodokon|zharodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zharodothoro|zharodothoro]] || [[word:zharodojoro|zharodojoro]] || [[word:zharodoshoro|zharodoshoro]] || [[word:zharodokoro|zharodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
